description_long: This is a linear metal fence composed of five vertical posts connected by a mesh panel with a diamond or honeycomb pattern. The mesh is made from interwoven metal strips, providing both visibility and security. The posts are evenly spaced and appear to be made of sturdy metal, likely steel, with a dark finish. The top edge of the fence is flat, with no decorative elements or post caps. The structure is utilitarian, designed for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or parking lots to delineate boundaries or restrict access. The overall appearance is industrial and functional, prioritizing durability and visibility.
description: A dark metal fence with five vertical posts and a diamond-patterned mesh panel, featuring a flat top and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The fence is seen from the end, showing only the thin profile of the posts and mesh.
description_view_1: The full length of the fence is visible, displaying the diamond-patterned mesh and five vertical posts.
description_view_2: The opposite end view, again showing the thin profile of the posts and mesh.
description_view_3: A mirrored view of the full fence, similar to view 1, with the mesh and posts clearly visible.
